user.title: Set up Autoterm Air 2D
user.description: Enter the serial port where the parking heater is connected to the Raspberry Pi.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll the heater status (5–60 seconds)

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Autoterm Air 2D
reconfigure.description: Change the serial port or poll interval.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect — please check the port and wiring.

abort.port_mismatch: The new port does not match this config entry.

data_description.heater_temp_source: Which sensor the heater firmware itself uses to reach the target temperature. Independent of the Home Assistant indoor sensor below.
data_description.external_temp_sensor: Optional Home Assistant temperature sensor used as an indoor thermostat. When set, a two-point controller drives the heater setpoint based on this sensor.
data_description.hysteresis: Allowed deviation from the target before the Home Assistant thermostat switches state (0.1–5 °C).

options.external: External sensor wired to the heater

freibrennschutz_aktiv.message: Cannot switch off yet — minimum run time protects the heater. Heater must run at least {minutes} minutes. Wait {remaining} more seconds.

turn_on_failed.message: Failed to turn on the heater. Check the serial connection.

turn_off_failed.message: Failed to turn off the heater. Check the serial connection.

fan_only_failed.message: Failed to switch to fan-only mode.

set_temperature_failed.message: Failed to set the target temperature.

unsupported_heater.title: Unsupported heater model detected
unsupported_heater.description: The heater reported an unknown product ID. The integration is designed for the Autoterm Air 2D (Planar 2D). Behavior may be unpredictable.
